Setup tags

Post-earnings continuation
Rate cut anticipation
Fed hedge swing

Discipline review

Best-performing setups came when entries waited for confirmation. The main process leak is still early entry before the trigger is active.

Mistake logging section

ENPH

Entered before trigger

Macro idea was reasonable, but execution ignored weak trend structure.

Open trades

Live positions and watch items that require discipline.

GLD

Fed hedge swing

OPEN

Wanted a defensive balance position ahead of CPI and Fed volatility.

Position size was correct; need patience into the event window.

Closed trades

Completed trades with review notes and outcomes.

MSFT

Post-earnings continuation

2.4R

Stable yields plus AI spend momentum supported follow-through after earnings.

Executed plan well and respected scale-out targets.

ENPH

Rate cut anticipation

-1.2R

Expected oversold bounce into lower yields, but price never confirmed.

Macro idea was reasonable, but execution ignored weak trend structure.

ASML

Relative strength base breakout

1.9R

Semicap leadership broadened as capital spending expectations improved.

Good patience on the entry. Could have pressed size a bit more.

Open trade review

Live ideas worth monitoring against discipline rules.

NVDA

REDUCE

958-972

Catalyst: Cloud capex survey and enterprise AI demand updates

Invalidation: Daily close back below 914

GLD

APPROVE

206-208

Catalyst: Fed dot plot and real yield reaction

Invalidation: Close below 201.8

XLI

REDUCE

128.5-130.5

Catalyst: Infrastructure procurement and PMI re-acceleration

Invalidation: Loss of 124.6 support
